---
title: "TERN Interactive Dashboard"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: columns
    vertical_layout: fill
    logo: image_logo.png
    self_contained: true
runtime: shiny
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
##### Install package (only needed the first time)#####
# install.packages("flexdashboard")
# install.packages("dplyr")
# install.packages("DT")
# install.packages("ggplot2")
# install.packages("ggpmisc")
# install.packages("leaflet")
# install.packages("shiny")
#######################################################


library(flexdashboard)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpmisc)
library(DT)
library(leaflet)
library(shiny)

# Import csv processed data-set

join_df_ab_species <-read.csv("processed_data/join_df_ab_species.csv", header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
join_df_ab_genus <-read.csv("processed_data/join_df_ab_genus.csv", header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
join_df_ab_family <-read.csv("processed_data/join_df_ab_family.csv", header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
join_df_rich <-read.csv("processed_data/join_df_rich.csv", header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
family_interest <-read.csv("Description_data/Family_interest.csv", header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
species_interest <-read.csv("Description_data/Species_interest.csv", header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

#Input vector
states <- c("NSW","NT","QLD","SA","TAS","VIC","WA")

env <-c("Precipitation" ="precipitationAnnualMean_millimetre",
        "Solar Radiation" ="solarRadiationMean_megajoulePerSquareMetre",
        "Max Temperature" = "maximumTemperature_degreeCelsius",
        "Min Temperature" ="minimumTemperature_degreeCelsius",
        "Average Temperature" ="temperatureAnnualMean_degreeCelsius",
        "Soil pH" ="average_soil_pH_unitless",
        "Soil EC" ="average_soil_EC_dSPerMetre")

soil <- c("Sand",
          "Clay loam", 
           "Loam",
           "Loamy sand",
           "Medium clay",
           "Light clay",
           "Sandy clay loam",
           "Sandy loam")

genus <- c("Acacia",
          "Eucalyptus",
          "Melaleuca",
          "Poaceae",
          "Chenopodium",
          "Corymbia",
          "Xanthorrhoea",
          "Melaleuca")


family <- family_interest$Family_Scientific

wet_species <- species_interest$Species[species_interest$Condition=="Wet forests"]

dry_species <- species_interest$Species[species_interest$Condition=="Dry species"]


#External URL
landuse_map_url <- "https://geo.agriculture.gov.au/arcgis/services/ABARESFLS/Land_use_of_Australia_2010_11_to_2015_16/MapServer/WMSServer"
landuse_map_attribute <- "ABARES 2022, Land use of Australia 2010–11 to 2015–16, 250 m, ABARES, Canberra, September CC BY 4.0."
legend_image_url_template <- "https://geo.agriculture.gov.au:443/arcgis/services/ABARESFLS/Land_use_of_Australia_2010_11_to_2015_16/MapServer/WMSServer?request=GetLegendGraphic%26version=1.3.0%26format=image/png%26layer="


map_layer_title <- c("2015-16 - Agriculture"=2,
                     "2015-16 - Agricultural industries"=3,
                     "2015-16 - 9 class classification"=4,
                     "2015-16 - 18 class classification"=5,
                     "2015-16 - Secondary classification"=6,
                     "2015-16 - Primary classification"=7,
                     "2010-11 - Agriculture"=9,
                     "2010-11 - Agricultural industries"=10,
                     "2010-11 - 9 class classification"=11,
                     "2010-11 - 18 class classification"=12,
                     "2010-11 - Secondary classification"=13,
                     "2010-11 - Primary classification"=14,
                     "2010–11 to 2015–16 - Land use change 18 class"=15
                     )


```




Taxon Abundance
=======================================================================


Column {.sidebar}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------
```{r}
radioButtons("taxon_var_1", 
            label= "Choose taxonomic rank:",
            choices = c("Family","Genus","Species"),
            selected = "Species")

# dynamic input
uiOutput("dynamic_input_1")

#static input
checkboxGroupInput("state_var_1", 
            label= "Choose State:",
            choices = states,
            selected = states,
            inline = TRUE)

selectInput("env_var_1", 
            label= "Choose numerical variable:",
            choices = env,
            selected = env[1])

selectInput("soil_var_1", 
            label= "Choose soil texture Grade:",
            choices = soil,
            selected = c(soil[1],soil[3],soil[6]),
            multiple = TRUE)

selectInput("map_var_1", 
            label= "Choose Land Use Map type:",
            choices = map_layer_title,
            selected = map_layer_title[3])



```



Column {.tabset}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

```{r}
output$dynamic_input_1 <- renderUI({

  switch(
    input$taxon_var_1,

    "Genus" = tagList(
      
      selectInput("genus_var_mult_1", 
            label= "Choose Multiple Genera",
            choices = genus,
            selected = c(genus[1],genus[2]),
            multiple = TRUE)
    ),
      

    "Family" = tagList(
       
      selectInput("family_var_mult_1", 
            label= "Choose Multiple Families",
            choices = family,
            selected= c(family[1]),
            multiple = TRUE)
      
    ),
    
    "Species" = tagList(
       
      selectInput("species_var_mult_1", 
            label= "Choose Multiple Species (Wet Forest)",
            choices = wet_species,
            selected= c(wet_species[1]),
            multiple = TRUE
            ),
      selectInput("species_var_mult_2", 
            label= "Choose Multiple Species (Dry)",
            choices = dry_species,
            selected= c(dry_species[1]),
            multiple = TRUE)
      
      
    )
  
  )
})
```



### Numerical variable

```{r}
renderPlot({
  
  switch(input$taxon_var_1,
         "Genus"={
           join_df_ab_genus %>%
            filter(stateCode %in% input$state_var_1&
              taxonGenus %in% input$genus_var_mult_1) %>%
            ggplot(aes_string(x = input$env_var_1, 
                       y = "abundance",
                        color = "taxonGenus")) +
            geom_point()+
            geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE)+
            stat_poly_eq(aes(label = paste(..eq.label.., ..rr.label.., sep = "~~~"),color=taxonGenus),
                         formula = y ~ x,
                         parse = TRUE)
         },
         
         "Family"={
           join_df_ab_family %>%
            filter(stateCode %in% input$state_var_1&
              taxonFamily %in% input$family_var_mult_1) %>%
            ggplot(aes_string(x = input$env_var_1, 
                       y = "abundance",
                        color = "taxonFamily")) +
            geom_point()+
            geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE)+
            stat_poly_eq(aes(label = paste(..eq.label.., ..rr.label.., sep = "~~~"),color=taxonFamily),
                         formula = y ~ x,
                         parse = TRUE)
         },
         
         "Species"={
           join_df_ab_species %>%
            filter(stateCode %in% input$state_var_1&
              scientificName %in% c(input$species_var_mult_1,input$species_var_mult_2)) %>%
            ggplot(aes_string(x = input$env_var_1, 
                       y = "abundance",
                        color = "scientificName")) +
            geom_point()+
            geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE)+
            stat_poly_eq(aes(label = paste(..eq.label.., ..rr.label.., sep = "~~~"),color=scientificName),
                         formula = y ~ x,
                         parse = TRUE)
         }
         
         )
  
  
})



```


### Soil texture

```{r}
renderPlot({
  switch(input$taxon_var_1,
         "Genus"={
    join_df_ab_genus %>%
    filter(stateCode %in% input$state_var_1&
           soil_texture_Grade %in% input$soil_var_1 &
           taxonGenus %in% input$genus_var_mult_1)%>%
    ggplot(aes(x = soil_texture_Grade, 
               y = abundance,
                color = taxonGenus)) +
    
    geom_boxplot(outlier.colour = "purple")
  },
  "Family"={
    join_df_ab_family %>%
    filter(stateCode %in% input$state_var_1&
           soil_texture_Grade %in% input$soil_var_1 &
           taxonFamily %in% input$family_var_mult_1)%>%
    ggplot(aes(x = soil_texture_Grade, 
               y = abundance,
                color = taxonFamily)) +

    geom_boxplot(outlier.colour = "purple")
    
  },
  "Species"={
    join_df_ab_species %>%
    filter(stateCode %in% input$state_var_1&
           soil_texture_Grade %in% input$soil_var_1 &
           scientificName %in% c(input$species_var_mult_1,input$species_var_mult_2))%>%
    ggplot(aes(x = soil_texture_Grade, 
               y = abundance,
                color = scientificName)) +

    geom_boxplot(outlier.colour = "purple")
    
  }
  
  
  
  )
     
})

```



### Taxon distribution Map

```{r}
renderLeaflet({
  
  landuse_legend_image_url <- paste0(legend_image_url_template,as.numeric(input$map_var_1))
  landuse_legend_image_html <-paste0("<h5>Land Use Type</h5><img src='",landuse_legend_image_url, "'style='width:300px'>")
  
  switch(
    input$taxon_var_1,

    "Genus" = {
      join_df_ab_genus %>%
      filter(stateCode %in% input$state_var_1&
        taxonGenus %in% input$genus_var_mult_1) %>%
      {
        pal <- colorFactor(
          palette = "Set1",
          domain = .$taxonGenus   # only filtered categories
        )
        leaflet(.) %>%
          addProviderTiles("Esri.WorldStreetMap", group = "Base") %>%
          addProviderTiles("Esri.WorldImagery", group = "Satellite") %>%
          addWMSTiles(
            baseUrl = landuse_map_url,
            layers = as.numeric(input$map_var_1),
            options = WMSTileOptions(
              format = "image/png",
              transparent = TRUE
            ),
            group = "Land Use",
            attribution = landuse_map_attribute
          )%>%
       
          addControl(
            html = landuse_legend_image_html, 
            position = "bottomleft"
            )%>%
          addLayersControl(
            baseGroups = c("Land Use","Base", "Satellite"),
            options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = FALSE)
          )%>%
          addCircleMarkers(
            lng = ~longitude_Degree,
            lat = ~latitude_Degree,
            radius = ~abundance/50,
            color = ~pal(taxonGenus),
            popup = ~paste0(
                "<b>Taxon Name:</b> ", taxonGenus,
                "<br><b>Abundance:</b> ", abundance,
                "<br><b>Precipitation (mm):</b> ", precipitationAnnualMean_millimetre,
                "<br><b>Solar Radiation(MJ/m²):</b> ", solarRadiationMean_megajoulePerSquareMetre,
                "<br><b>Annual temperature(°C):</b> ", temperatureAnnualMean_degreeCelsius,
                "<br><b>Soil pH:</b> ", round(average_soil_pH_unitless,3),
                "<br><b>Soil EC(dS/m):</b> ", round(average_soil_EC_dSPerMetre,3),
                "<br><b>Soil texture:</b> ", soil_texture_Grade
                )
          )%>%
          addLegend(
              "bottomright",
              pal = pal,
              values = ~taxonGenus,
              title = "Genus"
          )
    }
      
    },

    "Family" = {
        join_df_ab_family %>%
        filter(stateCode %in% input$state_var_1&
          taxonFamily %in% input$family_var_mult_1) %>%
        {
          pal <- colorFactor(
            palette = "Set1",
            domain = .$taxonFamily   # only filtered categories
          )
          leaflet(.) %>%
            addProviderTiles("Esri.WorldStreetMap", group = "Base") %>%
            addProviderTiles("Esri.WorldImagery", group = "Satellite") %>%
            addWMSTiles(
              baseUrl = landuse_map_url,
              layers = as.numeric(input$map_var_1),
              options = WMSTileOptions(
                format = "image/png",
                transparent = TRUE
              ),
              group = "Land Use",
              attribution = landuse_map_attribute
            )%>%
         
            addControl(
              html = landuse_legend_image_html, 
              position = "bottomleft"
              )%>%
            addLayersControl(
              baseGroups = c("Land Use","Base", "Satellite"),
              options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = FALSE)
            )%>%
            addCircleMarkers(
              lng = ~longitude_Degree,
              lat = ~latitude_Degree,
              radius = ~abundance/50,
              color = ~pal(taxonFamily),
              popup = ~paste0(
                  "<b>Taxon Name:</b> ", taxonFamily,
                  "<br><b>Abundance:</b> ", abundance,
                "<br><b>Precipitation (mm):</b> ", precipitationAnnualMean_millimetre,
                "<br><b>Solar Radiation(MJ/m²):</b> ", solarRadiationMean_megajoulePerSquareMetre,
                "<br><b>Annual temperature(°C):</b> ", temperatureAnnualMean_degreeCelsius,
                "<br><b>Soil pH:</b> ", round(average_soil_pH_unitless,3),
                "<br><b>Soil EC(dS/m):</b> ", round(average_soil_EC_dSPerMetre,3),
                "<br><b>Soil texture:</b> ", soil_texture_Grade
                  )
            )%>%
            addLegend(
                "bottomright",
                pal = pal,
                values = ~taxonFamily,
                title = "Family"
            )
          }
    },

    "Species" = {
        join_df_ab_species %>%
        filter(stateCode %in% input$state_var_1&
          scientificName %in% c(input$species_var_mult_1,input$species_var_mult_2)) %>%
        {
          pal <- colorFactor(
            palette = "Set1",
            domain = .$scientificName   # only filtered categories
          )
          leaflet(.) %>%
            addProviderTiles("Esri.WorldStreetMap", group = "Base") %>%
            addProviderTiles("Esri.WorldImagery", group = "Satellite") %>%
            addWMSTiles(
              baseUrl = landuse_map_url,
              layers = as.numeric(input$map_var_1),
              options = WMSTileOptions(
                format = "image/png",
                transparent = TRUE
              ),
              group = "Land Use",
              attribution = landuse_map_attribute
            )%>%
         
            addControl(
              html = landuse_legend_image_html, 
              position = "bottomleft"
              )%>%
            addLayersControl(
              baseGroups = c("Land Use","Base", "Satellite"),
              options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = FALSE)
            )%>%
            addCircleMarkers(
              lng = ~longitude_Degree,
              lat = ~latitude_Degree,
              radius = ~abundance/50,
              color = ~pal(scientificName),
              popup = ~paste0(
                  "<b>Taxon Name:</b> ", scientificName,
                  "<br><b>Abundance:</b> ", abundance,
                "<br><b>Precipitation (mm):</b> ", precipitationAnnualMean_millimetre,
                "<br><b>Solar Radiation(MJ/m²):</b> ", solarRadiationMean_megajoulePerSquareMetre,
                "<br><b>Annual temperature(°C):</b> ", temperatureAnnualMean_degreeCelsius,
                "<br><b>Soil pH:</b> ", round(average_soil_pH_unitless,3),
                "<br><b>Soil EC(dS/m):</b> ", round(average_soil_EC_dSPerMetre,3),
                "<br><b>Soil texture:</b> ", soil_texture_Grade
                  )
            )%>%
            addLegend(
                "bottomright",
                pal = pal,
                values = ~scientificName,
                title = "Species"
            )
          }
    }

  )
  
})

```


### Taxom Brief Description

```{r}

renderDataTable({
  switch(input$taxon_var_1,
         
  "Family"={
    df <- family_interest %>%
    select(Family_Scientific, 
           Family_Common,
           General_characteristics_Australia_focused,
           Rainforest_species_present.,
           Key_references)
    
    datatable(df, 
              options = list(scrollX = TRUE),
              rownames = FALSE,
              class = "stripe hover compact")
    
  },
  "Species"={
    df_2 <- species_interest %>%
    select(Species, 
           common_name,
           Likely_Affinity,
           distribution,
           Reference_link)
    
    datatable(df_2, 
              options = list(scrollX = TRUE),
              rownames = FALSE,
              class = "stripe hover compact")
    
  }
  
  )

  
})


```




Species Richness
=======================================================================



Column {.sidebar}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------
```{r}


checkboxGroupInput("state_var_2", 
            label= "Choose State:",
            choices = states,
            selected = states,
            inline = TRUE)

selectInput("env_var_2", 
            label= "Choose numerical variable:",
            choices = env,
            selected = env[1])

selectInput("soil_var_2", 
            label= "Choose soil texture Grade:",
            choices = soil,
            selected = c(soil[1],soil[7]),
            multiple = TRUE)

selectInput("map_var_2", 
            label= "Choose Land Use Map type:",
            choices = map_layer_title,
            selected = map_layer_title[3])

```



Column {.tabset}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------


### Numerical variable 


```{r}
renderPlot({
  join_df_rich %>%
  filter(stateCode %in% input$state_var_2) %>%
  ggplot(aes_string(x =input$env_var_2, 
             y = "unique_species_count")) +
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE)+
  stat_poly_eq(aes(label = paste(..eq.label.., ..rr.label.., sep = "~~~")),
               formula = y ~ x,
               parse = TRUE,
               label.x = 5,
               label.y = 15)
})

```






### Soil texture

```{r}
renderPlot({
  join_df_rich %>%
  filter(stateCode %in% input$state_var_2&
           soil_texture_Grade %in% input$soil_var_2)%>%
  ggplot(aes(x = soil_texture_Grade, 
             y = unique_species_count)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "lightgray") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1,outlier.colour = "red")
})

```



### Map

```{r}
renderLeaflet({
  pal <- colorNumeric(
  palette = "Blues",   # light → dark
  domain = join_df_rich$unique_species_count
  )
  
  landuse_legend_image_url <- paste0(legend_image_url_template,as.numeric(input$map_var_2))
  landuse_legend_image_html <-paste0("<h5>Land Use Type</h5><img src='",landuse_legend_image_url, "'style='width:300px'>")

  join_df_rich %>%
    filter(stateCode %in% input$state_var_2&
             !is.na(unique_species_count))%>%
    leaflet() %>%
        addProviderTiles("Esri.WorldStreetMap", group = "Base") %>%
        addProviderTiles("Esri.WorldImagery", group = "Satellite") %>%
        
        addWMSTiles(
          baseUrl = landuse_map_url,
          layers = as.numeric(input$map_var_2),
          options = WMSTileOptions(
            format = "image/png",
            transparent = TRUE
          ),
          group = "Land Use",
          attribution = landuse_map_attribute
        )%>%
     
        addControl(
          html = landuse_legend_image_html, 
          position = "bottomleft"
          )%>%
        
        
        addLayersControl(
          baseGroups = c("Land Use","Base", "Satellite"),
          options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = FALSE)
        )%>%
        addCircleMarkers(
          lng = ~longitude_Degree,
          lat = ~latitude_Degree,
          color = "black",
          weight = 1,
          fillColor = ~pal(unique_species_count),
          fillOpacity = 0.8,
          radius = 5,
          popup = ~paste0(
            "<b>Site Name:</b> ", siteName,
            "<br><b>Unique Species Number:</b> ", unique_species_count,
            "<br><b>Precipitation (mm):</b> ", precipitationAnnualMean_millimetre,
            "<br><b>Solar Radiation(MJ/m²):</b> ", solarRadiationMean_megajoulePerSquareMetre,
            "<br><b>Annual temperature(°C):</b> ", temperatureAnnualMean_degreeCelsius,
            "<br><b>Soil pH:</b> ", round(average_soil_pH_unitless,3),
            "<br><b>Soil EC(dS/m):</b> ", round(average_soil_EC_dSPerMetre,3),
            "<br><b>Soil texture:</b> ", soil_texture_Grade
            )
        ) %>%
        addLegend(
          "bottomright",
          pal = pal,
          values = ~unique_species_count,
          title = "Unique Species count",
          opacity = 1) 
})

```

### Sites detail

```{r}
df <- join_df_ab_species %>%
    select(siteName, 
           siteVisitStartDate,
           taxonFamily,
           taxonGenus,
           scientificName,
           abundance)
    
    datatable(df, 
              options = list(scrollX = TRUE),
              rownames = FALSE,
              class = "stripe hover compact")


```
